# PALAMOD RECREATED
- Note that this pack is designed for the mod [PALAMOD RECREATED](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladium)

- It mainly concerns the Interface

- Get into the Paladium theme with this resource pack

# Community !!!
e invite the community to join our Discord server if you wish to participate in resource pack updates and suggest modifications or fixes.
